01 — Home Page
The Brief

Where great care meets
great design.

Yakut Dental Clinic is a modern dental practice in the heart of Novi Pazar, led by Dr. Omar Yakut. They needed a website that matched the quality of their work — professional, trustworthy, and built to convert visitors into booked appointments.

We built a fully custom multi-page website featuring a before & after gallery with interactive sliders, a complete services section, Google Maps integration, and a booking form — all delivered with a clean, premium aesthetic.
